jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at BigBasket
jsonLd.description:
BigBasket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
